title: EZpack
description: Have new adventures with your (Pokémon) friends thanks to the Cobblemon!
body:
Explore a new world in fabric 1.19.2 full of ~~****mons~~ cobblemons with your friends (or alone) thanks to the cobblemon! Build amazing houses in the beautiful environments provided by the mods. Create absurd redstone systems to do the most complicated or simple, but most of all imaginative things.
All this without having to worry about performance or PC requirements as the modpack is optimised to run even from potato clocks

 

***How can I play?***  
I recommend using a server (or a virtual machine) as the server-side mods are only present on the server pack (mini-tutorial on how to use it in the readme), but in case you play single-player just download the mods from the serverpack and put them among the mods of the client versions.  
You can download the server pack on curseforge or on this link: https://drive.google.com/uc?export=download&id=1B3aFD386-BT8kDdNjhIDKoWuduyMPxtX  
For the client versions you can download the modpack via a launcher such as Prism or ATLauncher

 

***Previous versions***  
On curseforge there are versions in 1.7.10 (and some in 1.12.2, but I've delisted them) that are branded as "beta" and follow a similar concept to the current modpack, but without the pokemon and more towards the weapons, the classic modpack in 1.7.10. I don't know how much good it is to play those versions as they no longer represent the modpack and any problems I don't think will be fixed, but if you want you can always take a look at them :D

 

***Cobblemon support***  
I can't give direct support for the Cobblemon as I didn't make it myself, but you can ask on their Discord server (https://discord.com/invite/cobblemon)



***Curseforge***  
The modpack is on both modrinth and curseforge. Why? Curseforge has a really slow approvation process and Modrinth is the main place for addons made by the cobblestone community
 

***Special thanks***  
I would like to thank my friends to test every version of the modpack  
The awsome people that made the mods, expecially:  
LambdAurora and comp500 for creating the GitHub lists "OptiFine Alternatives" and "Quilt Server-side Mods" respectively  
xaero96 for creating the "Xaero's World Map" (https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xaeros-world-map) and the "Xaero's Minimap" (https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xaeros-minimap)  
SameDifferent for the permission to include the "Ecologics" (https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ecologics) in the modpack  
Clodsire#5946 for publishing the "Partners+" (https://discord.com/channels/934267676354834442/1087211573598224515) on the Cobblemon Discord server.  
 

 

**Don't forget to share the modpack :D**
